calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Marina R. Franco, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff MOSSER COMPANIES INC.
Witness Ryan Markiet sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant KIM CASEY NGOY.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibit:
1-Notice of Time and Place of Trial and Settlement Hearing and Certificate of Mail
2-Residential Tenancy Agreement (12 Pages)
3-Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit
Court returned all exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 839 Leavenworth Street, Unit 102, City and County of San Francisco, California 94109.

Damages $1462.82
Holdover damages $5217.32
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $465
For a Total Judgment of $7145.14

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-17-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 2
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Ryan Markiet
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kim Case Ngoy is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of January 17, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
